data.title: Bybit to end multiple Web3 services in strategic pivot
data.description:
Crypto exchange Bybit announced that it will discontinue a wide range of its Wweb3 products and services by the end of May, according to an April 16 notice. The exchange said the decision is part of a shift in its operational focus as it enters a new phase of growth and innovation.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bybit-to-end-multiple-web3-services-in-strategic-pivot/

data.title: Fed's Powell reasserts support for stablecoin legislation
data.description:
As digital assets gain mainstream adoption, establishing a legal framework for stablecoins is a “good idea,” said US Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. In an April 16 panel at the Economic Club of Chicago, Powell commented on the evolution of the cryptocurrency industry, which has delivered a consumer use case that “could have wide appeal” following a difficult “wave of failures and frauds,” he said. Powell delivers remarks at the Economic Club of Chicago
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fed-powell-reasserts-support-stablecoin-legislation?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Says Crypto And Banking Rules Will 'Loosen' As Sector Matures
data.description:
Fed Chair Powell signals loosening of regulations on crypto and stablecoins, citing need for clear framework. Industry welcomes shift in tone. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44850021/fed-chair-powell-says-crypto-and-banking-rules-will-loosen-as-sector-matures?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Trump Ethereum DeFi Project Gets Another Big Investment
data.description:
Dubai-based DWF Labs has purchased $25 million in WLFI, the native token of the Trump family-backed World Liberty Financial.
source: https://decrypt.co/315093/trump-ethereum-defi-project-big-investment

data.title: Crypto Prices Could Recover In Mid-To-Late 2025, Says Coinbase
data.description:
A new report from Coinbase Institutional suggests the crypto prices have entered a bear market phase. Potential recovery is not expected until mid-to-late Q2 2025.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/crypto-prices-could-recover-in-mid-to-late-2025-says-coinbase/

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's latest California prison once housed Al Capone
data.description:
Former FTX CEO Sam “SBF” Bankman-Fried has moved from a transit facility to a California prison that once housed infamous gangster Al Capone. According to the Federal Bureau of Prisons website, officials moved Bankman-Fried from the Federal Transfer Center in Oklahoma City briefly to the Federal Correctional Institution in Victorville before transferring him to a facility in Terminal Island in Los Angeles, California. The federal institution was once home to criminals like former Theranos chief operating officer Ramesh Balwani and Capone, who was convicted of tax evasion in 1931. During his 2023 trial and following his conviction on seven felony counts in 2024, Bankman-Fried was housed at the Metropolitan Detention Center in New York
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sam-bankman-fried-california-prison-al-capone?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto Takes Off in Panama: City to Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum for Public Services
data.description:
Panama City has embraced a new system for paying public services with Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC, and USDT, using local bank partnership.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/crypto-takes-off-in-panama-city-to-accept-bitcoin-ethereum-for-public-services/

data.title: Powell says the Fed is ready to provide dollar liquidity to foreign central banks through swap lines
data.description:
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell warned on Wednesday in Chicago that the U. S. central bank could be forced into a situation where it has to make tough, possibly painful decisions. The warning came as the Federal Reserve tries to deal with economic pressure coming from President Donald Trump’s escalating trade war. Powell added that the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powell-tariffs-hitting-harder-than-expected/

data.title: Raydium Debuts Solana Token Launchpad Following Split From Pump.fun
data.description:
LaunchLab by Raydium is now live, offering a more robust Solana token launchpad following a break with former ally Pump. fun.
source: https://decrypt.co/315140/raydium-solana-token-launchpad-pumpfun-split
